notes:
### v1.3.7

#### Updated
- Raid Management signup drafting is easier to use, with DPS and support counts defaulting from the selected raid composition while still allowing moderator overrides.
- Accepted Meowtator request threads now offer a create-signup flow and a done action so managers can turn requests into signups with less manual copying.
- Request-to-signup creation now supports signup info text, pre-registration, requester prefill, and editable raid composition lines.
- Meowtator requests now ask whether the requester can handle sidereals, and signup sheets can reserve or assign a visible lobby host/leader spot.
- Discord signup rows now prefer server profile names.
- Raid managers can delete ongoing signup sheets from the app or from Discord, with Meowtator removing the related signup message.
- Meowtator can automatically send signup reminders before raid start and clean up finished backlog tickets after their useful window.

#### Fixed
- Raid Management drafts now highlight missing input such as raid, start time, or spot configuration.
- Animated Meowtator role icons now render correctly in signup rows and buttons.
- Meowtator now rejects free-text request date/time values and asks users to use numeric server date and time.

#### Technical Notes
- Added request-to-signup modal support for info text, pre-register entries, requester auto-fill, and editable `DPS/SUP/ANY/EXP` composition lines.
- Added leader/sidereal status support across request intake, signup persistence, Discord signup rendering, app previews, and signup interaction handling.
- Added single-leader enforcement and reserved leader-slot behavior while no leader is assigned.
- Added `DISCORD_EMOJI_LEADER` support and wired animated leader emoji rendering.
- Added requester DM notifications when a ticket-created signup pre-registers them, plus `/meowtator-dm` opt-out support.
- Added private deletion audit routing for signup deletions into ticket threads or a backlog audit thread.
- Added automatic 15-minute reminder polling with `reminder_sent_at` tracking.
- Confirmed signup message cleanup removes published events two hours after their start and marks sheets expired.
- Added backlog cleanup for declined tickets after 24 hours and accepted/closed tickets two hours after requested server start, including Supabase row deletion.
- Tightened request date/time parsing to require valid `DD.MM.YYYY` and `HH:MM` values.
- Added Supabase helper SQL for signup notes, request links, DM preferences, leader status, auto reminders, and ticket cleanup policies.
